ads.prompt: Dr. Berg, a confident health and nutrition expert in a clean white studio, explains the top 5 benefits of intermittent fasting. He stands at a whiteboard with clear diagrams showing fat-burning cycles and insulin levels. Professional lighting, energetic and educational tone. Lower-third text overlays highlight key facts. Call to action: 'Watch the full video on YouTube.'

Real person UGC-style testimonial: a 45-year-old woman speaking directly to camera in her kitchen, casually dressed, saying how Dr. Berg's keto and fasting advice helped her lose 30 pounds and reverse pre-diabetes. Authentic, unfiltered, relatable. She holds up her phone showing Dr. Berg's YouTube channel. Caption: 'Dr. Berg changed my life. Free videos at DrBerg.com'

High-production TV spot for Dr. Berg's health brand. Opens with sweeping aerial shots of fresh vegetables and healthy meals. Cut to Dr. Berg in a modern clinic setting, authoritative and warm, speaking about the power of nutrition and natural health. Cinematic color grade, inspiring orchestral music, professional voiceover: 'Millions trust Dr. Berg for evidence-based health advice. Start your journey at DrBerg.com.' Ends with logo animation on black.
